meaning_cn: 随机应变 / 不提前计划，看情况再说
trap_check: 真正意思：不提前安排，到时候再说！

examples.en: We don't need a plan. Let's just play it by ear.
examples.cn: 我们不需要计划，到时候随机应变就好。

examples.en: I didn't prep anything. I'm gonna have to play it by ear.
examples.cn: 我什么都没准备，只能临场发挥了。

examples.source: Modern Family S3E09 · 摩登家庭
examples.en: No itinerary this time — we'll play it by ear.
examples.cn: 这次不做行程表了，走到哪算哪。
